why: New behavioral node sdd/touch-set-correction (21 boolean scenarios) for the git-diff touch-set correction tool — post-hoc reconcile of a declared touch-set vs the real diff (git diff + resolve-governances + gherkin-cli diff), read-only w.r.t. the mission graph. Cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS) on round 2 after a judge-iteration correction closed two builder coverage gaps (unresolvable artifact-type; frozen-vs-unfrozen touched .feature) and removed a premature @frozen; check-spec-state + check-suite green. Scope held strictly to the correction tool — finer-than-node ladder, hard/soft classification, SSA-lowering deferred to #189 remainder. Low-medium blast (new node, single-writer by construction, no existing consumers), leash auto-all.
